shadcn_combobox_in_dialog.snippet: await trigger.click({ force: true }); await page.waitForTimeout(400); await page.locator('[role="option"]').filter({ hasText: /^OPTION$/i }).first().click();
shadcn_combobox_in_dialog.trigger_locator_strategy: scope to dialog -> enumerate button[role='combobox'] -> for each, walk up 5 parents to find nearest <label> -> match label text (case-insensitive)

login_race_condition.pattern: Login to Frappe (hq.bebang.ph/login) first -> wait networkidle -> navigate to my.bebang.ph/login -> if URL still /login, fill form and submit -> wait for dashboard

toast_reading.note: not exercised in discovery (no submits) — locator provided for execution waves
